evidence.snippet:
The Highest Quality Carbon Fiber Made to Your Specifications
============================================================
We partner with manufacturers across a wide range of industries to elevate their products with carbon fiber parts tailored, machined, and molded to their needs. Our proprietary process produces zero porosity, cosmetically flawless carbon fiber — all made in the USA with fast turnaround times and no order minimums.

[![](https://protechcomposites.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/iStock-1019578840-1-2.png)](https://protechcomposites.com/industries/unmanned-aerial-vehicles)
##### [Unmanned Aerial Vehicles](https://protechcomposites.com/industries/unmanned-aerial-vehicles)
Fixed-wing or rotor, the lighter it is, the longer it stays airborne. Carbon fiber made unmanned aerial vehicles what they are today.

items.notes: Carbon fiber composite sheets, veneers, panels and custom machined/molded parts sold as raw material inputs; UAV is explicitly listed as an industry application

evidence.snippet:
[![](https://protechcomposites.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/iStock-1019578840-1-2.png)](https://protechcomposites.com/industries/unmanned-aerial-vehicles)
##### [Unmanned Aerial Vehicles](https://protechcomposites.com/industries/unmanned-aerial-vehicles)
Fixed-wing or rotor, the lighter it is, the longer it stays airborne. Carbon fiber made unmanned aerial vehicles what they are today.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells carbon fiber sheets, panels, veneers, and custom machined parts that are raw material inputs to drone airframes. UAV is one of many industry verticals served (knife handles, medical, marine, robotics, etc.). AeroVironment listed as a customer. Product line is not UXV-specific, but the materials definition of component_supplier applies.

ndaa.notes: Site prominently claims 'made in the USA' but makes no explicit NDAA Section 848/889 compliance claim.

evidence.snippet:
#### Fast Turnaround & Shipping Times
We move at the speed of your business—delivering faster than anyone else in the industry. We ship in-stock products within 48 hours and have a 10-day average turnaround for custom orders with no order minimum.

readiness.notes: Ships in-stock products within 48 hours; 65 catalog SKUs; 10-day average turnaround for custom orders with no order minimum.

unresolved_questions: drone_supply_chain_role at medium confidence due to broad industrial base across many non-UXV markets (knife handles, medical, marine, etc.) vs. UAV-specific applications page and AeroVironment client
Many product SKUs (65 total) not individually reviewed due to skipped pages

fetch_requests.reason: UAV-specific application page would confirm what carbon fiber products Protech sells specifically to drone manufacturers and clarify whether there is any UXV-specific product line

tagline: Manufactures carbon fiber sheets, veneers, and panels in thicknesses from 1.0–3.1mm, including high-temperature variants; production-ready, ISO 9001 certified, USA-made with no order minimums. NDAA compliance status unknown; no public evidence of defense prime contracts or Blue UAS certification.
